titleStmt.title: SII 26.246: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 246. (A.R. No. 234 of 1909.) ŚŌḺAMĀDĒVI, UDUMALAIPET TALUK, COIMBATORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription records a gift of a grove by Perumāḷ alias Perumāḷtōḻan to the Mēlaittirumaṭham (the holy monastery on the western side) of the temple of Kulaśēkhara-Īśvaramuḍaiyār in the village (name omitted). It is stated that the gift was intended for a lamp and for providing vegetable dishes in the said maṭham.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrī virarācentiratevaṟku tiruveḻuttiṭṭuc cellāṉinṟa tirunalliyāṇṭu Irupattoṉpatāvatu perumāḷḷāṉa perumāḷ toḻane
ṉ Ivvūril Āḷuṭaiyār kulacekariśvaramuṭaiyār koilukku melaittirumaṭattukku Ūṟpuṟampākaviṭṭa toṭṭattu teṟkil vācalil toṭṭattu pavilaikoṇṭuṭaiya toṭṭat
tukku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai mipatta toṭṭattukkum kāttāṇṭi toṭṭattukkum vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai Iṭṭalukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟke ṭṭatukku ṉāṉkellaiyāvatu kiḻpāṟkellai
vaṇikiḻāṉtār nilattukku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai peruvāykkālukku vaṭakkum melpārkellai Ayyaṉār koyiṟkum muṭikoṇṭā toṭṭattuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkel Immaṭattukku tiruviḷakkum kaṟiamutukkum ceṣamāka
viṭṭu kalveṭṭi kuṭutten perumāḷ toḻaneṉ Itu caṉtirātittavaṟ celvatāka śrīmākeśvararakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 26.246 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
